'''Fenves''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Boeus sector/Legends|Boeus sector]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Tyrn Jiton]].

{{Planet-stub}}
